tooltip.gwrexpansions.dragonsteel_gun.de: Increased the damage of the corresponding Elemental Dragon steel bullets
tooltip.gwrexpansions.lightning_dragon_g: Converts Fired Silver Bullets into Lightning Dragonsteel Bullets
tooltip.gwrexpansions.ice_dragon_gun.des: Converts Fired Silver Bullets into Ice Dragonsteel Bullets
tooltip.gwrexpansions.fire_dragon_gun.de: Converts Fired Silver Bullets into Fire Dragonsteel Bullets
tooltip.gwrexpansions.destiny_seven.desc: Uses iron, golden, or diamond bullets as lottery tickets
Diamond bullets have better odds than golden bullets; golden bullets beat iron bullets
Lottery shots become random bullets; non-jackpots build pity on this gun
tooltip.gwrexpansions.golden_bullet.desc: There is a chance that it will be broken into gold nuggets
tooltip.gwrexpansions.netherite_bullet.d: %f %% chance to drop as item after impact (except when fired from shotguns)
tooltip.gwrexpansions.diamond_bullet.des: Splits into multiple fragments on impact(fragments can pierce 2 entity)
tooltip.gwrexpansions.cursium_sniper.des: Converts Fired Golden Bullets into Cursium Bullets
Cursium Bullets Headshots will summon  phantasmal halberds to attack mobs near the target
tooltip.gwrexpansions.lavapower_bullet.d: Creates cross-shaped or X-shaped area of flame jet
tooltip.gwrexpansions.lavapower_gun.desc: Converts Fired Golden Bullets into Lava Power Bullets
creating an expanded area of flame coverage
tooltip.gwrexpansions.ignitium_gatling.d: Converts Fired Golden Bullets into Ignitium Bullets
Ignitium Bullets will heal the shooter
tooltip.gwrexpansions.tidal_pistol.desc: Converts Fired Golden Bullets into Tidal Bullets
tooltip.gwrexpansions.tidal_pistol.desc2: Apply Abyssal curse to target,Abyssal Curse will increase the damage to target
tooltip.gwrexpansions.tidal_pistol.desc3: Open a blast portal when the target have 5 level of Abyssal Curse
tooltip.gwrexpansions.magnetic_gatling.d: Crouch + Right-click to fire a magnetic pin
Metal bullets home to magnetic pins and orbit around them
Block pins hold up to 24 orbiting bullets and release them outward when removed
tooltip.gwrexpansions.licorice_fission_l: Candy Cavity: explosions create licorice strands between enemies; linked targets share damage
tooltip.gwrexpansions.extinction_burstgu: Primordial Caves: three-round lava burst with heavy knockback and explosive suppression
tooltip.gwrexpansions.blood_pact_revolve: Forlorn Hollows: consumes health to load blood-pact rounds; high risk, high return
tooltip.gwrexpansions.abyssal_harpoon_gu: Abyssal Chasm: hits continuously drag the target and deal damage
tooltip.gwrexpansions.raycat_fusion_irra: Toxic Caves: damage ramps while continuously locking the same target
tooltip.gwrexpansions.skullcrusher.desc2: As the firing time increases, the RPM and Damage are increased
tooltip.gwrexpansions.supershotgun.hook: Crouch + Right-click to launch the meat hook to pull you towards the target.
tooltip.gwrexpansions.hellforge_revolver: Marks targets with 'Aimed' effect, earn coins every %d shots
Throw coins, shoot them to made the bullets able to tracking
Tracking bullets deal +1.5% max HP damage per Aimed level
Bullets can ricochet between multiple coins, increasing damage with each bounce
Shift + Right Click to throw coin (consumes 1 coin)
message.gwrexpansions.no_coins: No coins available! Shoot to earn coins.
tooltip.gwrexpansions.voidflower.line1: Converts hunger ammo to bud bullets
tooltip.gwrexpansions.voidflower.line2: Bud bullets scatter spore bullets on hit
Fires Obsidian Cores that randomly cast one of three different spell effects
Longer charge time increases range and damage
tooltip.gwrexpansions.obsidian_core.desc: Ammunition for the Obsidian Launcher, can cast fire, frost, or holy spells
tooltip.gwrexpansions.skull.desc: Ammunition for the Skullcrusher, shatters into multiple bone fragments when crushed
tooltip.gwrexpansions.bone_scrap.desc: Sharp bone fragments created from crushed skulls, capable of piercing damage
tooltip.gwrexpansions.voidspike.desc: Void Spike, a rapid-fire biological weapon that releases healing spores
tooltip.gwrexpansions.bud_bullet.desc: Explodes on impact, releasing 8 slow-moving spores
tooltip.gwrexpansions.spore.desc: Slow-moving spores that heal the shooter when they hit enemies
tooltip.gwrexpansions.coin.desc: Thrown by the Hellforge Revolver, shooting coins makes bullets track targets
tooltip.gwrexpansions.tracking_bullet.de: Tracking bullets that ricochet off coins, increasing damage with each bounce
advancement.gwrexpansions.root.title: Guns Without Roses: Expansions
advancement.gwrexpansions.root.descripti: Obtain a gun to start your expansion journey
advancement.gwrexpansions.test_achieveme: Get a slime bullet to test the achievement system
Kill four targets with a single slime bullet via bouncing
advancement.gwrexpansions.gold_digger.de: Get a golden apple from a golden bullet shattering
advancement.gwrexpansions.stakeholders_s: Get hit by diamond bullet shrapnel as the shooter
advancement.gwrexpansions.dont_starve.de: Deplete food level with hunger bullet
advancement.gwrexpansions.bfg_600c.title: BFG 600℃
advancement.gwrexpansions.steves_lava_ch: Burn a chicken to death with flame jet from Lava power bullet
advancement.gwrexpansions.cenobites_lame: Create a portal for the first time using tidal bullet
Cast three different spells with the Obsidian Launcher
Kill an enemy using a ricocheting Obsidian Core
Hit four coins with a single bullet
advancement.gwrexpansions.hell_is_full.d: Kill a full health enemy with a bullet that ricocheted off a coin
